name: @metorial/scrapingant
description: Scrape web pages and extract data from websites using headless Chrome browsers with automatic proxy rotation, CAPTCHA bypass, and Cloudflare handling. Render JavaScript-heavy pages, execute custom JS snippets, and wait for specific page elements. Convert scraped HTML to Markdown for LLM/RAG use cases. Extract structured data using AI-powered extraction with free-form field descriptions. Configure proxy geo-targeting, block specific resource types, pass custom cookies and headers, and retrieve extended response data including cookies, headers, and XHR details. Check API credit usage and subscription status.
